query:
ALTER TABLE cf_cost_items 
  ADD COLUMN fundingSource ENUM('developer','escrow','mixed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'developer',
  ADD COLUMN escrowEligible TINYINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN phaseTag ENUM('pre_dev','construction','handover','all') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pre_dev';
